items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Model 1668A
Paseo, meaning "stroll" in Spanish. Crafted from shiny Nappa calfskin, creating a lazy yet sophisticated vibe
This is likely the most niche bag of 2023!
Some say it looks like a dumpling 🥟, others say it looks like a gold ingot
I think it's a breath of fresh air in the fashion world
Just carry it and be yourself
You won't clash with others; cool and chic, very unique, highly recommended
Available in 2 sizes
Small: 35*21*11.5cm
Paseo has been out for a while, a style worn by the "Big Power" (Megan Fox)
Actually, I didn't think it looked that good just sitting there, but it looks super nice on 👍🏻. Large capacity! Lightweight! Has a zipper! These three points make it perfect for workers
The leather texture is fine and smooth; can be carried by hand or worn on the shoulder
A "sailboat" shape that rarely clashes with others; you will definitely fall in love with it

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
🔥 Medium calfskin Anagram Tote handbag, linen patchwork tote features💥 No flashy designs, simple and practical type🌻 The design of the long and short shoulder straps looks quite good, the size is quite suitable, not too big🌹 Easily meets daily needs. In addition to the regular classic shoulder strap😻, it also features a unique woven handle❤️, adding a lot of stylishness and design sense to the simple look. The bag body is embossed with the iconic Anagram logo🌺, the recognizability and fashion sense are spot on😘, and it is comfortable and photogenic😍. Can be used with a longer calfskin top handle or a shorter handmade woven handle🌼. This size version is made of calfskin👜. The front is decorated with a large Anagram💋. "Carried by shoulder or top handle". Calfskin strap fastening* Two internal slip pockets*Calfskin lining⭐️
Dimensions: 29CM~25CM~14CM
Style No.: 9300 Full Leather
Color: Black Plain

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Small puzzle Tote Light Pear Brown
25.5-14.5-31.5 New 0.680 Model 1762
Glossy Calfskin Puzzle Fold
Inspired by the geometric lines of the brand's classic bags, the Puzzle Fold Bag reinterprets them with geometrically architectural appliqués. It folds completely, making it a perfect travel companion. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create a soft and lightweight bag, paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE logo.
Suede lining
LOWEY gold stamping

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Crossbody bag Avocado Green
Loє❤️wє New Arrival, the ultimate crossbody bag!
A must-have for fashionistas to look cool when going out~
The ever-popular Puzzle-derived puzzle hobo!
It sparked a lot of interest among bag lovers as soon as it appeared
The puzzle hobo inherits the classic geometric bag silhouette
Overall slimmer and sleeker
The wide strap looks more premium and stylish
Looks great handheld or worn on the shoulder!
Don't let its size fool you
The softness of Nappa calfskin makes the bag lightweight and incredibly spacious
Super practical for daily wear, simply excellent!
size:29*12*10cm

Genuine leather
Puzzle Edge Bag Latest version with adjustable strap Pale Pear Green
Lo*we🔥's debut tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of satin calfskin with cage-stitched edges🌟

Mini Nappa Calfskin Flamenco Clutch
Model 11050S
23.9-9-18cm
Released in the 1970s, the Flamenco Clutch features a drawstring closure and a signature twisted knot. This mini version is crafted from Nappa calfskin.
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand
Removable and adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic snap closure
Gold suede lining

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
🔥 New Puzzle Hobo is a soft and refined short Nappa leather shoulder bag 👜 Inspired by the Puzzle bag's rectangular shape and unique geometric lines, it starts with looks and stays true to the leather, especially the softness of the puzzle hobo which is stunning 🎀 The colors are super nice, stylish and versatile, cool yet sweet, really amazing, I love it 😻 Classic Nappa leather, soft and delicate to the touch~ The geometric design is really durable and can be carried for a long time 🖤 Short shoulder strap, one external zip pocket and one interior pocket ✨ Leather zip pull, D-ring to connect personalized charms 🔗 Chevron cotton canvas with Anagram embossing 🛍️
Dimensions: 28CM~10CM~5.5CM
Style No.: 8018
Color: Black

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
L❤ewe Mini Classic Cowhide Hammock Hobo Handbag Limited Edition for Qixi with Star ⭐ Charm "Deep Purple"
The Hammock Hobo deconstructs the design of a classic bag that can easily change shape, retaining the iconic hammock silhouette to create a stylish, versatile, and ergonomic Hobo bag. This mini version is made of classic cowhide, and the knotted cowhide strap allows for personalization.
Crossbody, shoulder, or handheld
Zipper closure
Cowhide zipper pull
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
Anagram Star charm
Model: 1301/730
Dimensions: 28×17×9.5cm
